---
title: "OPTIC Simulations"
author: "Joshua Eagan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

#
remotes::
library(optic)

```

# Description

This program grabs data from the following URLs and processes them to generate a panel dataset for analysis of negative spillover in the NHS Ghallari trial.

```{R}

# verify that provider codes match up acroos old and new files
# make sure the 28 day followup is being tracked the same

# reference the proposal (on sharepoint)

# linear (default) vs count (possibly try if we can, later, population offset {future problem})

# clustered errors at the region level
# wild bootstrapped standard errors (for robust SE) (don't incoporate into optic)
# roll up everything to the region level (not provider level) before optic

# https://github.com/maxgriswold/optic-time-vary/blob/main/code/03_run_simulations.R

# optic modeling
# calaway sa (csa_did)
# synthetic control (augsynth)
# AR (autoregressive)
# TWFE (twfe)

# no confounding

```

____________________________________

# Code

This section contains the code to construct the analytic dataset.

### Read in Analytic Data
